isolation.storeState: fresh on each navigation (in-memory Zustand), seeded mock world via browser console
isolation.apiKey: none configured — API calls fail with error toast (expected)

steps.action: Create a scene via New Scene button
steps.expected: Scene chip appears with amber highlight
steps.observed: Scene 1 chip appeared and became active with amber styling

steps.action: Seed mock world via browser console (import store, addWorld, assignWorldToScene)
steps.expected: WorldCard renders with thumbnail and Enter World button
steps.observed: WorldCard rendered with Test World thumbnail, Marble 0.1-plus badge, and Enter World button on hover

steps.expected: Switch to world-viewer mode with 520px canvas container
steps.observed: Viewer mode activated. Container height confirmed at 520px via DOM inspection. Canvas renders with vignette gradient overlay. All HUD controls visible.

steps.expected: Shows current lens (35mm default) with dropdown chevron
steps.observed: Lens selector button shows '35mm' with ChevronDown icon

steps.action: Click lens selector to open dropdown
steps.observed: Dropdown opened with all 5 options: Lens 24mm, Lens 35mm, Lens 50mm, Lens 85mm, Lens 135mm. Each shows FOV value.

steps.action: Verify active lens has amber highlight
steps.observed: 35mm option has amber highlight styling confirmed
Lens selector now shows '50mm', dropdown closed
Zoom displays '100%' in font-mono text-xs text-amber-400
Zoom increased from 100% to 110%
Zoom decreased from 110% to 100% to 90%

steps.expected: White border frame centered with L-shaped corners, crosshair, badges, AF
steps.observed: Frame found with border-2 border-white/30, aspect-ratio 1.77778 (16:9). 6 absolute child elements (4 corners + crosshair + badge container). Badges: ['35mm', 'f/1.8', '16:9', 'AF']
Frame dimensions 666x375, actual ratio 1.78, matching expected 16:9 (1.78)
Both attributes confirmed present

steps.expected: Take created with status transitioning from capturing to ready, success toast appears
steps.observed: Take created. Store shows take with status 'ready' and imageUrl populated. Toast 'Take captured!' appeared with 'View' action button.

steps.action: Click close (X) button in top-right of viewer
steps.expected: Return to canvas mode, viewer no longer visible
steps.observed: Returned to canvas mode. WorldCard visible again with Enter World button. DOM inspection confirmed canvas[aria-label='World viewer canvas'] no longer present.

steps.action: After closing viewer, scroll down to see takes grid
steps.expected: Captured take visible in grid-cols-3 layout with thumbnail and camera info badges
steps.observed: TAKES section visible with grid layout (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3, resolved to 3 columns at current viewport). One take card showing Panorama thumbnail with camera info badges '35mm' and 'f/1.8'.

steps.expected: Reset camera (RotateCcw), Motion toggle (Move3D), Capture Take pill
steps.observed: All three controls present with correct aria-labels and SVG icons: 'Reset camera', 'Toggle motion', 'Capture Take'

steps.action: Zoom to 120% then click Reset camera
steps.expected: Zoom returns to 100%, camera transform resets
steps.observed: Zoom reset from 120% to 100%. Lens confirmed at 35mm (default).
Motion toggled to true. Button class changed to 'border-amber-500/40 bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400'
Motion toggled back to false. Button class changed to 'border-zinc-700/40 bg-zinc-900/70 text-zinc-400'

steps.expected: Rotation at {x:0, y:0, z:0} after reset
steps.observed: Camera rotation confirmed at {x:0, y:0, z:0}

steps.action: Mouse down on canvas, drag 100px right and 50px down, mouse up
steps.observed: Camera rotation changed to {x:0.15, y:0.3, z:0} after drag. Values updated proportionally to drag distance (sensitivity 0.003).
isDraggingRef set to false on mouseUp, no further rotation changes

frictions.description: The 'Enter World' button only appears on hover over the WorldCard. After scrolling, the hover state may be lost requiring explicit mouse move to the card area before clicking.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser scroll + mouse move to trigger hover, or used the annotated screenshot which detected the button when it was visible

frictions.description: Seeding the Zustand store required dynamic import via browser console since window.__ZUSTAND_DEVTOOLS__ was not directly accessible. Used 'await import("/src/lib/stores/worldview-store.ts")' which works in Vite dev mode.
frictions.resolution: Dynamic ESM import of the store module worked correctly in Vite HMR context

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 9 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All viewer mode features working correctly — Enter World activation, camera HUD with 5 lens options, zoom controls, viewfinder frame with correct 16:9 aspect ratio and all UI elements, capture take with toast confirmation, close button returning to canvas, takes grid display, bottom controls (reset/motion/capture), and mouse drag orbit simulation. No console errors throughout all testing.
